response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/web engineer with strong testing discipline and some embedded-adjacent exposure (LabWindows/CVI C work at NI, wave-field-synthesis C++ project), but the resume shows no recent C/UNIX embedded firmware experience, no LAN-switch or networking-stack work (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP), no Linux kernel modification background, and critically lacks the hard requirement of native-level Japanese proficiency. Profile is mismatched for an embedded security IC role.
strengths: Long, senior career with strong software craftsmanship, TDD and CI/CD discipline
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments and on low-level audio/embedded projects
Linux familiarity and broad multi-language adaptability
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency listed (hard requirement)
No demonstrated experience with LAN-switch security stacks (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) or Linux kernel modification
Recent ~10 years are web/cloud/TypeScript-focused, not embedded firmware C on UNIX
